chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Ist Appeal No.10 of 2023 Farhan Dahri and another Versus M/s. Sindh Bank Limited DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.5325/2023 (U/A). 2. For orders on CMA No.5032/2023 (U/O-39 R-1 CPC). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.619/2023 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 23.11.2023 Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Advocate along with Appellants. Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, Advocate for the Respondent.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Urgency granted. 2) Appellants have moved this application and submit that since the dispute between the appellants and respondent was settled amicably out of court, the appeal be withdrawn. Order accordingly. The appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
